ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression record */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "avg_log_foldchange" REAL /* Average log fold change in gene expression */,
  "pct_1_enriched_cluster" REAL /* Percentage of cells in the enriched cluster expressing the gene */,
  "pct_2_other_clusters" REAL /* Percentage of cells in other clusters expressing the gene */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted P-value for multiple testing corrections */,
  "cluster" TEXT /* Cluster where the gene is enriched */,
  "rap_format" TEXT /* Gene ID in RAP format */,
  "msu_format" TEXT /* Gene ID in MSU format */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue sample */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for analysis */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_rap_format FOREIGN KEY ("rap_format") REFERENCES gene_annotation_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_msu_format FOREIGN KEY ("msu_format") REFERENCES gene_annotation_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_cluster FOREIGN KEY ("cluster") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the cluster is derived from */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotation_formats" (
  "format_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each annotation format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the gene expression record */,
  "gene_expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_versions_gene_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression ("gene_expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
